Furthermore, this extension provides a hub feature and convenience functions to access a wide range of information within ComfyUI.

08月18日.zh_des: ComfyUI-Manager是一个扩展，旨在增强ComfyUI的可用性。它提供了安装、删除、禁用和启用ComfyUI的各种自定义节点的管理功能。此外，该扩展还提供了集线器功能和方便的函数来访问ComfyUI中的各种信息。
08月18日.name: ltdrdata /ComfyUI-Manager
08月18日.description: ComfyUI-Manager is an extension designed to enhance the usability of ComfyUI. It offers management functions to install, remove, disable, and enable various custom nodes of ComfyUI. Furthermore, this extension provides a hub feature and convenience functions to access a wide range of information within ComfyUI.
